notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-366 — thanks for testing! FIXED: ↩ Undo saying 'Could not find that trade' on beta. It now finds the trade even while the auto-pilot is running AND even if the trade's recorded sell-date shifted since you closed it. Also new: 🧮 fix fees button (💼 Portfolio, next to ➕ add cash) resets an account's Fees Paid to what its trades actually add up to, and 💾 Backup now saves BOTH accounts in one file. Please re-test Undo and let me know via the ✉ feedback link. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load it.
